userrights-groupsmember-auto: Xubin aan toos ahayn oo ka tirsan:
userrights-groups-help:
Waxaad beddeli kartaa kooxaha {{GENDER:$1|isticmaalahani}} ku jiro:
* Sanduuq la saxay waxa uu ka dhigan yahay in isticmaaluhu ku jiro kooxdaas.
* Sanduuq aan la saxin waxa uu ka dhigan yahay in isticmaaluhu aanu ku jirin kooxdaas.
* * waxa uu muujinayaa in aadan ka saari karin kooxda marka aad ku dartay, ama lidkeeda.
* # waxa uu muujinayaa in aad kaliya dib u dhigi karto waqtiga dhammaadka xubinimada kooxdaas; ma soo hor marin kartid.
userrights-watchuser: La soco bogagga isticmaalaha iyo bogagga wadahadalka ee isticmaalahan
userrights-no-interwiki: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku beddesho xuquuqaha isticmaalayaasha ee wiki-yada kale.
userrights-nodatabase: Xog ururinta $1 ma jirto ama ma aha mid deegaanka ku jirta.
userrights-restricted-group-warning-priv: Kooxdan waxay leedahay xannibaado la hubin doono kaliya ka dib marka foomka la gudbiyo
userrights-expiry-options: Wuxuu dhacayaa 1 maalin:1 day,Wuxuu dhacayaa 1 toddobaad:1 week,Wuxuu dhacayaa 1 bil:1 month,Wuxuu dhacayaa 3 bilood:3 months,Wuxuu dhacayaa 6 bilood:6 months,Wuxuu dhacayaa 1 sano:1 year
userrights-invalid-expiry: Waqtiga dhammaadka ee kooxda "$1" waa aan saxnayn.
userrights-expiry-in-past: Waqtiga dhammaadka ee kooxda "$1" waa hore u dhaafay.
userrights-no-group: Isticmaalayaasha ku meel gaarka ah ma laha kooxo.
userrights-conflict: Khilaaf ku yimid isbeddelada xuquuqda isticmaalaha! Fadlan dib u eeg oo xaqiiji isbeddeladaada.
userrights-unable-to-change:
Lama kaydin karo isbeddelada kooxaha {{GENDER:$2|isticmaalaha}}, sababo {{PLURAL:$3|sabab|sababaha}} soo socda awgood:
$1
userrights-insufficient-rights: {{GENDER:|Adigu}} ma lihid xuquuq aad ku samayso isbeddelkan.
right-createpage: Samaynta bogag (taasoo aan lahayn bogag wadahadal)
right-createpreviouslyrenamedaccount: Abuur xisaabo leh magacyo isticmaale oo hore loo isticmaalay xisaabo la beddelay
right-autocreateaccount: Si toos ah u gal adigoo adeegsanaya akoon isticmaale dibadeed
right-suppressredirect: Ha abuurin dib u siitoosin laga sameeyo bogagga ilaha marka bogagga la wareejinayo
right-reupload-own: Dib u qor faylasha hore loo soo geliyay ee uu qofku isagu soo geliyay
right-reupload-shared: Ka beddel faylasha ku jira kaydka warbaahinta ee la wadaago si maxalli ah
right-autoconfirmed: Lama saameyn doono xaddidaadaha xawaaraha ee ku saleysan IP-ga
right-nominornewtalk: Ha ka dhigin wax ka beddelada yar ee bogagga wadahadalka inay kiciyaan ogeysiiska fariimaha cusub
right-apihighlimits: Isticmaal xadad sare marka la sameynayo weydiimaha API-ga
right-delete-redirect: Tirtir dib u wareejin hal isbeddel ah
right-deletelogentry: Tirtir oo dib u soo celi gelitaanno gaar ah oo diiwaanka ah
right-deleterevision: Tirtir oo dib u soo celi noocyada gaarka ah ee bogagga
right-deletedhistory: Eeg gelitaannada taariikhda ee la tirtiray, iyada oo aan la muujin qoraalka la xiriira
right-deletedtext: Eeg qoraalka la tirtiray iyo isbeddellada u dhexeeya noocyada la tirtiray
right-suppressrevision: Eeg, qari oo dib u soo bandhig noocyada gaarka ah ee bogagga ee isticmaale kasta
right-viewsuppressed: Eeg noocyada laga qariyay isticmaale kasta
right-block: Xanib ama ka qaad xanibaad isticmaaleyaasha kale ee wax ka bedelka
right-blockemail: Xanib ama ka qaad xanibaad isticmaalaha inuu iimayl diro
right-hideuser: Xannib ama ka qaad xannibaadda magaca isticmaale, adigoo ka qarinaya ama ka muujinaya dadweynaha
right-ipblock-exempt: Ka gudub xannibaadaha IP-ga, xannibaadaha otomaatiga ah iyo xannibaadaha kala duwan
right-protect: Beddel dejimaha ilaalinta oo wax ka beddel bogagga leh ilaalinta is-xigta
right-editprotected: Wax ka beddel bogagga la ilaaliyay ({{int:restriction-level-sysop}})
right-editsemiprotected: Wax ka beddel bogagga la ilaaliyay ({{int:restriction-level-autoconfirmed}})
right-editcontentmodel: Wax ka beddel qaabka ee bogga
right-createwithcontentmodel: Abuur bogag leh qaabab aan ahayn kuwa caadiga ah
right-editinterface: Wax ka beddel is dhexgalka isticmaalaha
right-editusercss: Wax ka beddel faylasha CSS ee isticmaalayaasha kale
right-edituserjson: Wax ka beddel faylasha JSON ee isticmaalayaasha kale
right-edituserjs: Wax ka beddel faylasha JavaScript ee isticmaalayaasha' kale
right-editsitecss: Wax ka beddel CSS guud ee goobta
right-editsitejson: Wax ka beddel JSON guud ee goobta
right-editsitejs: Wax ka beddel JavaScript guud ee goobta
right-editmyusercss: Bedel galalka CSS ee isticmaalaha laftiisa
right-editmyuserjson: Wax ka beddel faylasha JSON ee isticmaalahaaga
right-editmyuserjs: Bedel galalka JavaScript ee isticmaalaha laftiisa
right-editmyuserjsredirect: Wax ka beddel faylasha JavaScript ee isticmaalahaaga ee ah dib u tilmaamo
right-editmywatchlist: Tafatir liiskaaga la socodka (ogow in falalka qaar ay weli ku dari karaan bogag xitaa adigoon haysan xuquuqdan)
right-viewmyprivateinfo: Eegista macluumaadka gaarka ah (sida ciwaanka e-mail-ka, iyo magaca saxda ah)
right-editmyprivateinfo: Tafatir xogtaada gaarka ah (tusaale: ciwaanka iimaylka, magaca dhabta ah) oo codso iimaylo dib u dejin sirta ah
right-rollback: Si degdeg ah dib ugu celi wax ka beddelada isticmaalahii ugu dambeeyay ee wax ka beddelay bog gaar ah
right-markbotedits: Ku calaamadee wax ka beddelada dib loo celiyay inay yihiin wax ka beddelada bot-ka
right-import: Ka soo dhoofi bogag wiki-yada kale
right-importupload: Ka soo dhoofi bogag ka yimid fayl la soo geliyay
right-patrol: Ku calaamadee wax ka beddelka dadka kale inay yihiin kuwo la kormeeray
right-autopatrol: Isbeddelladaada si toos ah ha loogu calaamadeeyo in la kormeero
right-unwatchedpages: Eeg liiska bogagga aan la socon

right-override-export-depth: Dhoofinta bogagga, oo ay ku jiraan bogagga la xiriira ilaa heer qoto dheer oo 5 ah
right-changetags: Ku dar oo ka saar calaamado aan xadidnayn [[Special:Tags|calaamadaha]] oo ku saabsan dib u eegisyo iyo gelitaanno diiwaan gaar ah

listgrouprights-summary:
Kani waa liiska koox isticmaale yaal ah ee la aqoonsaday wikigaan, in ay leeyihiin xuquuqdaan.
Waxaa laga yaabaa in ay halkaan ku jiraan [[{{MediaWiki:Listgrouprights-helppage}}|macluumaad dheeraad ah]] ee ku saabsan xuquuqaha kala gadisan.
listgrouprights-key: Ciwaanka: * Xuquuq la siiyey * Xuquuq laga qaaday
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-bypassa: Isticmaalayaasha leh xuquuqda "$1" ($2) waxay siin karaan kooxdan iyagoo ka gudbaya shuruudaha kor ku xusan.
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-autodem: Isticmaalayaasha aan buuxin shuruudaha kore si otomaatig ah ayaa looga saari doonaa kooxdan.
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-op-and: Waa in uu buuxiyaa dhammaan kuwan soo socda: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-op-or: Waa in uu buuxiyaa ugu yaraan mid ka mid ah kuwan soo socda: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-op-xor: Waa in uu si sax ah u buuxiyaa mid ka mid ah kuwan soo socda: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-op-nand: Waa in aanu buuxin mid ka mid ah kuwan soo socda: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-ag: Koontada isticmaalaha ayaa la sameeyay ugu yaraan $1 ka hor
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-in: Isticmaaluhu waa xubin ka tirsan {{PLURAL:$1|kooxda|kooxaha oo dhan}}: $2
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-is: Isticmaaluhu wuxuu isticmaalayaa cinwaan IP ah: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-ip: Isticmaaluhu wuxuu isticmaalayaa cinwaan IP ah oo ku jira xadka: $1
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-ag: Isticmaaluhu wuxuu sameeyay tafatirkiisii ugu horreeyay ugu yaraan $1 ka hor
listgrouprights-restrictedgroups-cond-bl: Koontada isticmaalaha waa laga xannibay dhammaan bogga
listgrouprights-namespaceprotection-rest: Xuquuqda u oggolaanaysa isticmaalaha inuu wax ka beddelo
restrictedgroups-autodemotion-log-reason: Si otomaatig ah ayaa looga saaraya {{GENDER:$1|isticmaale}} {{PLURAL:$2|koox xaddidan|kooxo xaddidan}}
listgrants-summary:
Kuwa soo socda waa liiska xuquuqaha la bixiyo iyo gelitaanka xuquuqaha isticmaalaha ee la xiriira. Isticmaalayaashu waxay oggolaan karaan codsiyo inay isticmaalaan akoonkooda, laakiin leh oggolaansho xaddidan oo ku saleysan xuquuqaha uu isticmaaluhu siiyay codsiga. Codsi ku shaqeynaya magaca isticmaale ma isticmaali karo xuquuqo uusan isticmaaluhu lahayn.

Waxaa jiri kara [[{{MediaWiki:Listgrouprights-helppage}}|macluumaad dheeraad ah]] oo ku saabsan xuquuqaha gaarka ah.
